goal: is_monoid_hom[G, H](f) = (f(G.1) = H.1 and forall(x0: G, x1: G) { f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) })

p.c: function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.1) = T0.1 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 * x2) = x0(x1) * x0(x2) }) = is_monoid_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[H, G](f)
not is_monoid_hom[G, H](f) or (H.1 = f(G.1) and forall(x0: G, x1: G) { f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) })
not is_monoid_hom[G, H](f) or forall(x0: G, x1: G) { f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) } = true
(forall(x0: G) { not is_monoid_hom[G, H](f) or forall(x1: G) { f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) } = true })
(forall(x0: G) { forall(x1: G) { f(x0 * x1) = f(x0) * f(x1) } = true })
